mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO author_ranking ( id, userId, rankingType, timeRange, contentCount, totalViewCount, totalLikeCount, totalCommentCount, totalFavoriteCount, totalShareCount, fansCount, followCount, accountAgeDays, activeDays, lastPublishTime, rankingScore, rankingPosition ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.rankingType}, #{item.timeRange}, #{item.contentCount}, #{item.totalViewCount}, #{item.totalLikeCount}, #{item.totalCommentCount}, #{item.totalFavoriteCount}, #{item.totalShareCount}, #{item.fansCount}, #{item.followCount}, #{item.accountAgeDays}, #{item.activeDays}, #{item.lastPublishTime}, #{item.rankingScore}, #{item.rankingPosition} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contentCount = VALUES(contentCount), totalViewCount = VALUES(totalViewCount), totalLikeCount = VALUES(totalLikeCount), totalCommentCount = VALUES(totalCommentCount), totalFavoriteCount = VALUES(totalFavoriteCount), totalShareCount = VALUES(totalShareCount), fansCount = VALUES(fansCount), followCount = VALUES(followCount), accountAgeDays = VALUES(accountAgeDays), activeDays = VALUES(activeDays), lastPublishTime = VALUES(lastPublishTime), rankingScore = VALUES(rankingScore), rankingPosition = VALUES(rankingPosition), updateTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
